en-US.title: Finify: Subscription Tracker
en-US.subtitle: Track, Save & Cancel Smarter
en-US.description:
Finify helps you take control of your subscriptions — without connecting your bank account.

Track every recurring payment in one place. Add subscriptions manually, scan bank statements with AI, or snap a screenshot to import automatically. Finify shows you exactly where your money goes each month.

KEY FEATURES:

- Smart Import: Scan bank statements or screenshots with AI to detect subscriptions instantly
- Billing Calendar: See upcoming payments at a glance with a visual calendar
- Budget Tracking: Set monthly spending goals and track progress in real time
- Free Trial Alerts: Never get charged for a forgotten trial again — countdown reminders for 3 days, 1 day, and day-of
- Health Score: Get a personalized subscription health grade (A-F) based on spending habits
- Bundle Detection: Discover savings by bundling overlapping services
- Cancellation Guides: Step-by-step instructions to cancel 100+ services
- Rich Analytics: 6-month trends, category breakdowns, month-over-month comparisons
- Multi-Currency: Track subscriptions in any currency with live exchange rates
- Lifetime Purchase: One-time payment option — no subscription to track your subscriptions
- Privacy First: Your financial data stays on your device. No bank account access required.

PRO FEATURES:
- AI Bank Statement Scanning
- Cloud Sync across devices
- CSV/PDF Data Export
- Biometric Lock (Face ID / Touch ID)
- Ad-free experience

Available in English and Turkish. Works on iPhone & iPad.
en-US.releaseNotes: Welcome to Finify! Track all your subscriptions in one place. Scan bank statements with AI, get free trial reminders, and discover savings with bundle detection.
